chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1660 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 04.11.2016. Mr. Karamullah Memon, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel alongwith SIP Muhammad Sulleman SHO P.S Kumb. -.-.-. Today, Mr. Wahid Bux Aajiz Laghari, Advocate, files vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No. 5 to 9, who are also present in person, and has produced a Fatwa and submits that English translation whereof will be filed under his statement that the marriage between the petitioners is even otherwise void ab initio as petitioner No.1 is niece of petitioner No.2’s present wife. Learned State Counsel has filed comments on behalf of official respondents and has submitted that no harassment has been caused to the petitioners by police officials. This is a very unique and peculiar case and cannot be disposed of in a routine manner and therefore, keeping in view the present position, learned State Counsel is directed to procure the attendance of petitioner No.1 Mst. Kainat daughter of Muhammad Saleh and under his official supervision she should be sent to Darul Aman where the said petitioner No.1 will remain till the decision of this petition. Copy of this order be provided to learned State Counsel for immediate compliance. Adjourned to 22.11.2016 at 01:00 p.m. JUDGE Ali Haider
